A '''Hutt Citadel''' was a fortress owned by a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]. [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] had such a building on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] in [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]].

Unlike the tri-domed structure of his [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|palace]], the Hutt Citadel of Jabba's was a series of mostly flat-roofed cylindrical towers, with [[Ion attractor]]s in the center of each one, that housed craft including many flyers to rout attacking forces and a [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]].

{{Struct-stub}}
